hero_subtitle: SFTY structures and preserves audit-ready evidence from multiple compliance providers to support clear decisions and maintain trust across institutional workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Fragmented compliance outputs from multiple providers create gaps that slow decision-making and weaken audit readiness. Teams struggle to maintain a clear, traceable evidence trail necessary for institutional trust and regulatory review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects multi-provider outputs with role-based access, audit logs and case workflows to create a unified, traceable evidence trail that supports institutional audit readiness and bank due diligence.
workflow_title: From provider checks to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects provider outputs through validation, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation to support traceable compliance and governance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. One evidence-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY preserves provider outputs as connected evidence supporting compliance decisions, audit readiness and enterprise governance without replacing existing tools or workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY helps regulated VASPs preserve and govern provider outputs with audit-ready evidence and enterprise deployment for robust bank due diligence and compliance control.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows preserve audit-ready evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how provider outputs connect to compliance decisions
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare role-based access controls for enterprise compliance teams
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for enterprise compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY serves as a compliance control layer connecting provider outputs into structured workflows, evidence, decisions and reporting for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY preserve provider evidence?
faq_2_answer: SFTY preserves provider outputs by capturing case history, decision logs and evidence in a connected, auditable format supporting traceability and operational review.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY support audit and reporting?
faq_3_answer: SFTY structures cases and evidence to support audit-ready workflows, including SAR/STR-style drafts, compliance reports and reporting workflows where applicable.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects to existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs without requiring changes to current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY does not replace providers; it aggregates and organizes their results into a cohesive compliance workflow and operational evidence layer.
final_title: Preserve provider evidence within structured workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY maintains audit-ready evidence and role-based access across compliance providers for institutional trust and governance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
